issues.description: Missing cost specification: trigger 'Activated' requires 'cost' field to specify 'Rest 1 of your DON!! cards and this Character'. DSL must include cost object with RestDon and Rest actions.
SearchDeck filter incomplete: should specify 'maxResults':1 to represent 'up to 1' card. Current DSL lacks this constraint.
SearchDeck action missing 'searchCount':5 parameter to represent 'Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck'. Current DSL does not specify deck depth examined.

Missing mandatory action for card placement: effect requires remaining 4 cards to be 'placed at the bottom of your deck in any order' - DSL must include PutToDeck or equivalent action with position specification.
